mapper.select: SELECT MNG_CODE AS mngCode , PIN_NUMBER As pinNumber , TO_CHAR(EXPIRE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS expireDate , PIN_GUBUN AS pinGubun , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_PIN_INFO', 'PIN_GUBUN', PIN_GUBUN) AS pinGubunNm , ONOFF_GUBUN AS onoffGubun , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_PIN_INFO', 'ONOFF_GUBUN' , ONOFF_GUBUN) AS onoffGubunNm , STATUS AS status , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_PIN_INFO', 'STATUS', STATUS) AS statusNm , START_PRICE AS startPrice , NOW_PRICE AS nowPrice , CR_ADMIN_ID AS crAdminId , F_GET_ADMIN_NM(CR_ADMIN_ID) AS CR_ADMIN_NM , TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS crDate , CR_SN AS crSn , CR_SEQ AS crSeq , OUT_FLAG AS outFlag , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_PIN_INFO', 'OUT_FLAG', OUT_FLAG) AS outFlagNm , TO_CHAR(OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS outDate , OUT_ADMIN_ID AS outAdminId , F_GET_ADMIN_NM(OUT_ADMIN_ID) AS outAdminNm , OUT_AGENT_TYPE AS outAgentType , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_PIN_INFO', 'OUT_AGENT_TYPE', OUT_AGENT_TYPE) AS outAgentTypeNm , OUT_AGENT_ID AS outAgentId , F_GET_AGENT_NM(OUT_AGENT_ID) AS outAgentNm , OUT_DEALER_ID AS outDealerId , F_GET_AGENT_NM(OUT_DEALER_ID) AS outDealerNm , OUT_PRICE AS outPrice , OUT_SEQ AS outSeq , OPEN_FLAG AS openFlag , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_PIN_INFO', 'OPEN_FLAG', OPEN_FLAG) AS openFlagNm , OPEN_ADMIN_ID AS openAdminId , F_GET_ADMIN_NM(OPEN_ADMIN_ID) AS openAdminNm , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS openDate , OPEN_SEQ AS openSeq , SALE_FLAG AS saleFlag , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_PIN_INFO', 'SALE_FLAG', SALE_FLAG) AS saleFlagNm , SALE_ADMIN_ID AS saleAdminId , F_GET_ADMIN_NM(SALE_ADMIN_ID) AS saleAdminNm , TO_CHAR(SALE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS saleDate , SALE_SEQ AS saleSeq , RCG_FLAG AS rcgFlag , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_PIN_INFO', 'RCG_FLAG', RCG_FLAG) AS rcgFlagNm , TO_CHAR(RCG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS rcgDate , RCG_SEQ AS rcgSeq , FREE_FLAG AS freeFlag , DECODE(FREE_FLAG,'N','판매', 'Y','수수료', '-') AS freeFlagNm , DECODE(CONTRACT_NUM, 0, '', CONTRACT_NUM) AS contractNum , REMARK AS remark FROM PPS_PIN_INFO WHERE MNG_CODE = #{mngCode}

SELECT value, text FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(START_MNG_CODE, 1, 6) AS value, SUBSTR(START_MNG_CODE, 1, 6) AS text FROM PPS_PIN_SUMMARY_CREATE WHERE START_MNG_CODE IS NOT NULL ) GROUP BY text ORDER BY text DESC

SELECT A.OPEN_SEQ AS openSeq, A.START_MNG_CODE AS startMngCode, A.END_MNG_CODE AS endMngCode, A.START_MNG_CODE||'~'|| A.END_MNG_CODE AS mngCodeStr, A.OPEN_COUNT AS openCount, A.PIN_CHARGE_SUM AS pinChargeSum, A.AGENT_CHARGE_SUM AS agentChargeSum, A.OPEN_ADMIN_ID AS openAdminId, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(OPEN_ADMIN_ID) AS openAdminNm, A.OPEN_DATE AS openDate, A.OPEN_AGENT_TYPE AS openAgentType, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_PIN_SUMMARY_OPEN', 'OPEN_AGENT_TYPE', OPEN_AGENT_TYPE) AS openAgentTypeNm, A.OPEN_AGENT_ID AS openAgentId, F_GET_AGENT_NM(OPEN_AGENT_ID) AS openAgentNm, A.OPEN_DEALER_ID, F_GET_AGENT_NM(OPEN_DEALER_ID) AS openDealerNm, A.PAY_AMT AS payAmt, A.PAY_FLAG AS payFlag, DECODE(PAY_FLAG,'Y','수납','미수납') AS payFlagNm, TO_CHAR(A.PAY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS payDate, TO_CHAR(A.RECORD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS recodeDate, A.FREE_FLAG AS freeFlag, DECODE(A.FREE_FLAG,'N','판매', 'Y','수수료', '-')AS freeFlagNm , A.REMARK AS remark FROM PPS_PIN_SUMMARY_OPEN A WHERE A.OPEN_SEQ = #{searchOpenSeq}

SELECT AGENT_ID AS agentId, F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_ID) AS agentNm, NVL(DEPOSIT,0) AS deposit, DEPOSIT_RATE AS depositRate, PPS35_DEPOSIT_RATE AS pps35DepositRate, DATA_RATE AS dataRate, PIN_BUY_RATE AS pinBuyRate, RENTAL_FEE AS rentalFee, VIR_ACCOUNT_ID AS virAccountId, NVL(F_GET_VAC_BANK_NAME(VIR_ACCOUNT_ID),'') virBankNm, NVL(F_GET_VAC_BANK_CODE(VIR_ACCOUNT_ID),'') virBankCd, ADMIN_ID AS adminId, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(ADMIN_ID) AS adminNm, TO_CHAR(RECORD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS recordDate FROM PPS_AGENT WHERE AGENT_ID=#{searchAgentId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
F_GET_ADMIN_NM(CR_ADMIN_ID) CR_ADMIN_NM,
'ALL' CR_ADMIN_NM,
TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') CR_DATE,
'ALL' CR_DATE,
SUM(CR_COUNT) CR_CNT, SUM(CR_COUNT * START_PRICE) CR_AMT, SUM(DECODE(CANCEL_FLAG, 'Y', CR_COUNT, 0)) CR_CAN_CNT, SUM(DECODE(CANCEL_FLAG, 'Y', CR_COUNT, 0) * START_PRICE) CR_CAN_AMT FROM PPS_PIN_SUMMARY_CREATE WHERE 1=1
AND CR_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMM')
AND CR_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYYMM'), 1)
GROUP BY 'ALL'
, CR_ADMIN_ID
, TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY 'ALL'
, CR_ADMIN_NM ASC
, CR_DATE DESC
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
F_GET_ADMIN_NM(CR_ADMIN_ID) CR_ADMIN_NM,
'ALL' CR_ADMIN_NM,
TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') CR_DATE,
'ALL' CR_DATE,
SUM(CR_COUNT) CR_CNT, SUM(CR_COUNT * START_PRICE) CR_AMT, SUM(DECODE(CANCEL_FLAG, 'Y', CR_COUNT, 0)) CR_CAN_CNT, SUM(DECODE(CANCEL_FLAG, 'Y', CR_COUNT, 0) * START_PRICE) CR_CAN_AMT FROM PPS_PIN_SUMMARY_CREATE WHERE 1=1
AND CR_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMM')
AND CR_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYYMM'), 1)
GROUP BY 'ALL'
, CR_ADMIN_ID
, TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY 'ALL'
, CR_ADMIN_NM ASC
, CR_DATE DESC
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
F_GET_ADMIN_NM(OPEN_ADMIN_ID) OP_ADMIN_NM,
'ALL' OP_ADMIN_NM,
TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') OP_DATE,
'ALL' OP_DATE,
SUM(OPEN_COUNT) OP_CNT, SUM(PIN_CHARGE_SUM) OP_AMT, SUM(AGENT_CHARGE_SUM) SL_AMT, SUM(DECODE(CANCEL_FLAG, 'Y', OPEN_COUNT, 0)) OP_CAN_CNT, SUM(DECODE(CANCEL_FLAG, 'Y', PIN_CHARGE_SUM, 0)) OP_CAN_AMT FROM PPS_PIN_SUMMARY_OPEN WHERE 1=1
AND OPEN_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMM')
AND OPEN_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYYMM'), 1)
GROUP BY 'ALL'
, OPEN_ADMIN_ID
, TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY 'ALL'
, OP_ADMIN_NM ASC
, OP_DATE DESC
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
F_GET_ADMIN_NM(OPEN_ADMIN_ID) OP_ADMIN_NM,
'ALL' OP_ADMIN_NM,
TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') OP_DATE,
'ALL' OP_DATE,
SUM(OPEN_COUNT) OP_CNT, SUM(PIN_CHARGE_SUM) OP_AMT, SUM(AGENT_CHARGE_SUM) SL_AMT, SUM(DECODE(CANCEL_FLAG, 'Y', OPEN_COUNT, 0)) OP_CAN_CNT, SUM(DECODE(CANCEL_FLAG, 'Y', PIN_CHARGE_SUM, 0)) OP_CAN_AMT FROM PPS_PIN_SUMMARY_OPEN WHERE 1=1
AND OPEN_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMM')
AND OPEN_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYYMM'), 1)
GROUP BY 'ALL'
, OPEN_ADMIN_ID
, TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY 'ALL'
, OP_ADMIN_NM ASC
, OP_DATE DESC
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
START_PRICE,
'ALL' START_PRICE,
TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') CR_DATE,
'ALL' CR_DATE,
SUM(TOT_CNT) TOT_CNT, SUM(TOT_AMT) TOT_AMT, SUM(CR_CNT) CR_CNT, SUM(CR_AMT) CR_AMT, SUM(OT_CNT) OT_CNT, SUM(OT_AMT) OT_AMT, SUM(OP_CNT) OP_CNT, SUM(OP_AMT) OP_AMT, SUM(RE_CNT) RE_CNT, SUM(RE_AMT) RE_AMT, SUM(ST_CNT) ST_CNT, SUM(ST_AMT) ST_AMT, SUM(CL_CNT) CL_CNT, SUM(CL_AMT) CL_AMT, SUM(ETC_CNT) ETC_CNT, SUM(ETC_AMT) ETC_AMT, SUM(OT_CNT + OP_CNT) SL_CNT, SUM(OT_AMT + OP_AMT) SL_AMT FROM PPS_PIN_STATS_DAILY WHERE 1=1
AND CR_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMM')
AND CR_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYYMM'), 1)
GROUP BY 'ALL'
, START_PRICE
, TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY 'ALL'
, START_PRICE ASC
, CR_DATE DESC
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
START_PRICE,
'ALL' START_PRICE,
TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') CR_DATE,
'ALL' CR_DATE,
SUM(TOT_CNT) TOT_CNT, SUM(TOT_AMT) TOT_AMT, SUM(CR_CNT) CR_CNT, SUM(CR_AMT) CR_AMT, SUM(OT_CNT) OT_CNT, SUM(OT_AMT) OT_AMT, SUM(OP_CNT) OP_CNT, SUM(OP_AMT) OP_AMT, SUM(RE_CNT) RE_CNT, SUM(RE_AMT) RE_AMT, SUM(ST_CNT) ST_CNT, SUM(ST_AMT) ST_AMT, SUM(CL_CNT) CL_CNT, SUM(CL_AMT) CL_AMT, SUM(ETC_CNT) ETC_CNT, SUM(ETC_AMT) ETC_AMT, SUM(OT_CNT + OP_CNT) SL_CNT, SUM(OT_AMT + OP_AMT) SL_AMT FROM PPS_PIN_STATS_DAILY WHERE 1=1
AND CR_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMM')
AND CR_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYYMM'), 1)
GROUP BY 'ALL'
, START_PRICE
, TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY 'ALL'
, START_PRICE ASC
, CR_DATE DESC
)
